  "experiment_overview": "The experiment involves measuring the force reaction of a mock cartilage sample under different conditions to assess the mechanical properties of the acetabular labrum. The goal is to understand how the labrum's integrity affects the resistance to force.",

    "A person in a lab coat is seen setting up an experiment involving a mock cartilage sample placed on a mechanical device.",

    "Graphical data from the experiment is displayed, showing the relationship between the force reaction and the condition of the labrum."
